subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath spoken forth in the Kingdom of divine knowledge and caused all things to utter praise of His Own Self, the All-Subduing over all contingent being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نطق فی ملکوت العرفان و انطق کلشیء بثناء نفسه المهیمنه علی الامکان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
